description: AI enrichment data for master categories - indexed by category code

MCAT-COFFEE.aiDescription: Coffee and espresso-based drinks for energy and enjoyment. Perfect for morning wake-ups and afternoon breaks.

MCAT-TEA.aiDescription: Traditional and modern tea beverages. Calming and refreshing options for any time of day.

MCAT-SMOOTHIES.aiDescription: Blended fruit drinks and milkshakes. Sweet, refreshing, and often healthy options.

MCAT-JUICE.aiDescription: Fresh squeezed and natural fruit juices. Healthy, refreshing, vitamin-rich beverages.

MCAT-SOFTDRINKS.aiDescription: Carbonated soft drinks and sodas. Sweet and fizzy refreshments for any occasion.

MCAT-BEER.aiDescription: Local and international beers. The social drink for hangouts, parties, and relaxation.

MCAT-SPIRITS.aiDescription: Whiskey, vodka, rum, gin, and other distilled spirits. For those who appreciate fine liquor.

MCAT-WINE.aiDescription: Red, white, and sparkling wines. Elegant choice for special occasions and fine dining.

MCAT-COCKTAILS.aiDescription: Mixed alcoholic drinks and cocktails. Creative, fun, and flavorful drink options.

MCAT-MAIN.aiDescription: Main course dishes including stir-fries, curries, and meat dishes. Hearty and satisfying meals.

MCAT-RICE.aiDescription: Rice-based dishes including fried rice and rice with toppings. The staple of Asian cuisine.

MCAT-NOODLES.aiDescription: Noodle soups and stir-fried noodles. Comfort food classics from various Asian cuisines.

MCAT-SALADS.aiDescription: Thai and Lao salads including somtam and laab. Bold, spicy flavors perfect with beer.

MCAT-SOUPS.aiDescription: Soups and curries including tom yum and green curry. Warming, aromatic, and nourishing.

MCAT-GRILLED.aiDescription: Grilled meats, seafood, and vegetables. BBQ favorites with smoky, savory flavors.

MCAT-FRIED.aiDescription: Deep-fried dishes - crispy, golden, and satisfying. Universal comfort food favorites.

MCAT-SEAFOOD.aiDescription: Fresh seafood dishes - fish, shrimp, crab, and more. Ocean flavors at their finest.

MCAT-SNACKS.aiDescription: Drinking snacks and appetizers. Perfect accompaniments to beer and spirits.

MCAT-DESSERTS.aiDescription: Sweet treats and desserts. The perfect end to any meal or an indulgent snack.

MCAT-BREAKFAST.aiDescription: Morning meals and breakfast items. Start your day right with satisfying breakfast options.
